title: White Banners
writer: Lenore J. Coffee, Cameron Rogers, Abem Finkel
actors: Claude Rains, Fay Bainter, Jackie Cooper
plot: A homeless woman named Hannah drifts into the lives of the kindly Ward family, in a small Indiana town in 1919. Hannah makes herself useful as a cook and housekeeper and stays with the Wards... but her real interest is in meeting ...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 2 nominations total
